title: Amtech A2320 Mattock Handle
features: DURABLE: This sturdy beechwood mattock handle is 900mm (35") long and has a width of 30mm (1.2")
VERSATILE: It is compatible with standard size mattock heads, including Amtech model number A2315
PRACTICAL SIZE: 900mm length provides reach and stability.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
PORTABLE DESIGN: Compact ideal for working in confined spaces.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your gardening requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage, and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
